prompt.text:
帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:AI 合同审核系统。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/79-ai-contract-review-system.html

[环境] NocoBase env `maxbench02`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e maxbench02 -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `ai79_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `maxbench02` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。
prompt.launchInstruction: First read the nocobase-prototype-repro skill (SKILL.md + references/). Then read ~/prj/vscodes/app-library-bench/tooling/bench/prompts/round-61-90/p79.prompt.txt as the user requirement and reproduce it END-TO-END in the NocoBase env 'maxbench02' via the nb CLI (ALWAYS pass -e maxbench02): SPEC -> data modeling in ONE pass -> all-English seed (every enum) -> list pages (Filter+Add+Table+View drawer+sub-tables) -> refine signature regions -> screenshot self-check >=80%. Autonomous, no questions. End with a FINAL REPORT: collections, signature pageUid(s), Self-Score, comparison notes, gaps.

outcome.finalText:
The build is complete and verified end-to-end. Here is the final report.

---

# FINAL REPORT — AI Contract Review System (ClauseGuard), prototype p79 → NocoBase `maxbench02`

## ① Collections (prefix `ai79_`, 6 total)
| Collection | Title | Rows | Key fields | Relations |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ai79_contracts` | Contracts (main, titleField=title) | 12 | title, counterparty, contract_value, contract_date, summary, score, progress, issues_high/med/low, **contract_type**(12 enum), **file_format**(PDF/DOCX), **risk**(high/med/low), **status**(needs-review/in-negotiation/cleared) | reviewer m2o→reviewers; o2m **issues / terms / checks / activities** |
| `ai79_reviewers` | Reviewers | 3 | name, initials, role, color | ← contracts.reviewer |
| `ai79_issues` | Risk Findings | 55 | title, **severity**, confidence, category, body, suggest_delete, suggest_insert | contract m2o |
| `ai79_terms` | Extracted Terms | 73 | term_key, term_value, **confidence_level** | contract m2o |
| `ai79_compliance` | Compliance Checks | 43 | check_name, description, **check_status**(Violation/Missing/Review/Compliant) | contract m2o |
| `ai79_activities` | AI Activity | 6 | headline, detail, occurred_at, **kind**(risk/cleared/redline/routed) | contract m2o |

Seed is all-English and covers every enum branch ≥1 (all 12 contract types, both file formats, all 3 risk/status/severity/confidence levels, all 4 check_status + activity kinds), dense (55 findings / 73 terms / 43 checks across 12 contracts).

## ② Signature page
**Review Board** dashboard — `pageSchemaUid = l882kcxnhlb` (`/admin/l882kcxnhlb`), under menu group **AI Contract Review**.
CRUD list pages: Contracts `kjyqry6g9w1` (rich View drawer = Details + 3 association sub-tables), Reviewers `ghv7lq8lg9p`, Risk Findings `6c8qpdbxier`, Extracted Terms `mqq55m1qwi1`, Compliance Checks `5627ejym1td`, AI Activity `0i5c3gfykmt`.

## ③ Self-Score: 8.5/10

## ④ Comparison vs prototype
- **Region→block mapping faithful:** KPI strip (4 cards + spa

transcript.cmd: {"skill": "nocobase-prototype-repro"}

transcript.text:
Base directory for this skill: ~/.claude/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro

# Goal

Turn a prototype + a one-line ask into a faithful NocoBase app. This is a **meta / orchestration skill** — it sequences `nocobase-data-modeling` + `nocobase-ui-builder` + `nocobase-app-discipline` and adds the two things that decide fidelity: a **region → native-block mapping** and a **visual convergence loop**. It does not re-teach the CLI; it routes to the sibling skills for mechanics and owns only the reproduction-specific judgment.

# When to use / Non-Goals

**Hard gate (check before selecting this skill):** there must be an actual prototype in hand — an HTML file, a screenshot, or a link to one — that you are matching against. No prototype, no fidelity gap → this is **not** the skill; a plain "build me an app / a page" request belongs to `nocobase-app-discipline` (whole system) or `nocobase-ui-builder` (single page/edit). Do not let this skill shadow the normal build flow.

**Use when:**
- The user gives a prototype (HTML file, link, screenshot, or a `public/prototypes/...` URL to curl) and wants it reproduced in NocoBase.
- A page already exists but the user says it's monotone / ugly / doesn't match the prototype / a region should be a list/card/kanban instead of a table — i.e. there is a **visual target and a fidelity gap**.

**Non-Goals — hand off, do not do here:**
- Pure data modeling (collections/fields/relations with no visual target) → `nocobase-data-modeling`.
- Workflows / automations → `nocobase-workflow-manage`. ACL / permissions → `nocobase-acl-manage`. Plugin work → `nocobase-plugin-development`.
- A localized UI edit with **no visual target and no fidelity gap** (move one field, rename an action, tweak a reaction) → `nocobase-ui-builder` **directly**. This skill is only worth its overhead when you are matching a prototype's look/behavior; for a mechanical surface edit, skip straight to ui-builder.
- Whole-page authoring from a business sentence with **no** prototype → author a quick prototype first ([prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md)), then this skill; or if the user just wants a generic page, that's `nocobase-ui-builder`'s `applyBlueprint`.

# Router — task shape → read first

Hit one route, read its "first" doc, and only open the "then" docs when that route is still not enough. Sibling skills own the mechanics; the reference files here own the reproduction-specific judgment.

| Task shape | Read first | Then, as needed |
|---|---|---|
| Prototype handed over → reproduce end-to-end | [spec-template.md](references/spec-template.md) (Phase 1 SPEC) | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md), [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) |
| Existing page is monotone / ugly / off | [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md) |
| "Which block for this region?" | the **Region → native block** table below | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Need a **JS body** for a widget (KPI card, donut, leaderboard, due-soon alert, progress bar, trend, facet filter, card grid, …) | [template-library/_index.md](references/template-library/_index.md) — 57 copy-pastable widget bodies, each with its `$p` input contract | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Build/edit JS, flow-surfaces, popup, chart **mechanics** + runnable CLI | `nocobase-ui-builder` (its `js.md` / `popup.md` / `chart.md` / `runjs-*` / `page-archetypes.md`) | — |
| Collections / fields / relations | `nocobase-data-modeling` | — |
| Scope discipline, seed standards, naming, final report | `nocobase-app-discipline` | — |
| No prototype given, must author one | [prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md) | — |
| Hand the build to another agent fro

transcript.text:
The build is complete and verified end-to-end. Here is the final report.

---

# FINAL REPORT — AI Contract Review System (ClauseGuard), prototype p79 → NocoBase `maxbench02`

## ① Collections (prefix `ai79_`, 6 total)
| Collection | Title | Rows | Key fields | Relations |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ai79_contracts` | Contracts (main, titleField=title) | 12 | title, counterparty, contract_value, contract_date, summary, score, progress, issues_high/med/low, **contract_type**(12 enum), **file_format**(PDF/DOCX), **risk**(high/med/low), **status**(needs-review/in-negotiation/cleared) | reviewer m2o→reviewers; o2m **issues / terms / checks / activities** |
| `ai79_reviewers` | Reviewers | 3 | name, initials, role, color | ← contracts.reviewer |
| `ai79_issues` | Risk Findings | 55 | title, **severity**, confidence, category, body, suggest_delete, suggest_insert | contract m2o |
| `ai79_terms` | Extracted Terms | 73 | term_key, term_value, **confidence_level** | contract m2o |
| `ai79_compliance` | Compliance Checks | 43 | check_name, description, **check_status**(Violation/Missing/Review/Compliant) | contract m2o |
| `ai79_activities` | AI Activity | 6 | headline, detail, occurred_at, **kind**(risk/cleared/redline/routed) | contract m2o |

Seed is all-English and covers every enum branch ≥1 (all 12 contract types, both file formats, all 3 risk/status/severity/confidence levels, all 4 check_status + activity kinds), dense (55 findings / 73 terms / 43 checks across 12 contracts).

## ② Signature page
**Review Board** dashboard — `pageSchemaUid = l882kcxnhlb` (`/admin/l882kcxnhlb`), under menu group **AI Contract Review**.
CRUD list pages: Contracts `kjyqry6g9w1` (rich View drawer = Details + 3 association sub-tables), Reviewers `ghv7lq8lg9p`, Risk Findings `6c8qpdbxier`, Extracted Terms `mqq55m1qwi1`, Compliance Checks `5627ejym1td`, AI Activity `0i5c3gfykmt`.

## ③ Self-Score: 8.5/10

## ④ Comparison vs prototype
- **Region→block mapping faithful:** KPI strip (4 cards + sparklines) ✓, Portfolio Risk Index semicircle **gauge** with needle ✓, Issues-by-Category horizontal **bars** ✓, AI Activity **feed** with kind-colored icons ✓, status tabs + risk filter **pills** ✓ (verified cross-filtering the grid — "Needs Review" → exactly 4 cards), responsive **card grid** (auto-fill `minmax(355px,1fr)`) with the exact card anatomy: risk-colored left accent bar, PDF/DOCX file tile, score badge colored by band, status/risk/type pills, progress line, high/med/low issue counts, reviewer avatar ✓.
- **Drawer:** clicking a card opens the native NocoBase drawer — Details (Overview / Status & Score / AI Assessment / Audit field groups) + Risk Findings / Extracted Terms / Compliance sub-tables — the native equivalent of the prototype's analysis pane.
- **Live data vs mocks:** numbers differ from the prototype's hardcoded values (12 contracts vs 18; gauge 53 vs 61) — correct behavior for real data, noted not fudged. (Interesting: the prototype itself renders "undefined" issue counts due to a duplicate `issues` key in its seed; my version shows real derived counts.)

## ⑤ Gaps / pitfalls hit
- **Gap:** the prototype's left **document-viewer pane** (faux contract text with clickable highlighted clauses synced to findings) is not reproduced — mapped to the native Details + sub-tables instead (no native block expresses a synced rich-text highlighter). **Gap:** "Avg AI Turnaround 38s" KPI → "Avg AI Score" (no turnaround field in the model). Minor cosmetic band whitespace below the shorter gauge/bars cards (equalized via min-height).
- **Pitfall 1 — custom view popup w/ sub-tables fails `apply-blueprint`** (`block-layout-single-column`, then the edit recordAction's generated popup demands fieldGroups in a context that ignores top-level defaults). Fix per `maxbench02` memory: author auto `["view","edit","delete"]` + `defaults.collections.X.fieldGroups`, then add sub-tables via `add-block --target {uid:<ViewActionModel>} --resource associatedRecords` (backend mat
